title: Episode 1
overview: In the nostalgic Kowloon Walled City, Reiko Kujirai is mistaken as her coworker Hajime Kudo's girlfriend.

title: Episode 2
overview: Reiko tells Yaomay about the photo. Then Reiko meets Miyuki Hebinuma at the free beauty consultation.

title: Episode 3
overview: Kudo looks for Gwen to no avail. Meanwhile, a masked man tells Reiko she and Kujirai B are different people.

title: Episode 4
overview: Miyuki Hebinuma investigates Kowloon with Gwen. Meanwhile, Reiko decides to keep living in Kujirai B's room.

title: Episode 5
overview: Reiko tries to learn more about Kujirai B. Meanwhile, Yaomay acts strange when Reiko mentions the name Yangli.

title: Episode 6
overview: Gwen tells Reiko and Yaomay that the residents of Kowloon have the second version of themselves.

title: Episode 7
overview: Miyuki continues to investigate Kowloon and Kurijais situation with Yulongs help. Its a painfull anniversary for Kudo and Kurijai and Yaomay attempt to leave Kowloon.

title: Episode 8
overview: Reiko learns there are people who can’t see her. Yaomay goes to Hong Kong to investigate.

title: Episode 9
overview: Yaomay forgets what happened in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, a young man named Xiaohei appears.

title: Episode 10
overview: Reiko notices that Kujirai B’s glasses show her B’s vision. Then she finds a warning on a talisman.

title: Episode 11
overview: Reiko takes the boy Xiaohei to meet the girl Xiaohei. Gwen starts to figure out how this Kowloon is created.

title: Episode 12
overview: Miyuki gives up on his revenge, and Reiko learns the true cause of death of Kujirai B from talking to Yulong.

title: Episode 13
overview: As reality and fiction, past and present intwetwine, Reiko witnesses Kudo's memory of Kujirai B's death.
